requirement_topic.en: AC Charging Connector Standard — IEC 62196 Type 2 (Austria / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 交流充电接口标准——IEC 62196 Type 2（奥地利／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 交流充電接口標準——IEC 62196 Type 2（奧地利／歐盟）

summary.en: EU public AC recharging points are subject to AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Type 2 for normal-power AC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-2 describes the Type 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR, while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route. Austria, as an EU member state, is directly subject to AFIR without any need for national transposition. Type 2 is the standard for all public AC charging points in Austria.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共交流充电点受AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定普通功率交流充电点采用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR，IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。奥地利作为欧盟成员国，AFIR直接适用，无需国家转化立法。Type 2是奥地利所有公共交流充电点的标准接口。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共交流充電點受AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定普通功率交流充電點採用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR，IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。奧地利作為歐盟成員國，AFIR直接適用，無需國家轉化立法。Type 2是奧地利所有公共交流充電點的標準接口。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging, which defines a physically distinct 7-pin connector incompatible with IEC Type 2. GB/T plugs cannot mate with EU/Austrian Type 2 sockets. There is no bilateral connector recognition or mutual acceptance agreement between China GB/T and EU IEC 62196 standards.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电采用GB/T 20234.2标准，定义了与IEC Type 2物理上不兼容的7针接口。GB/T插头无法与欧盟/奥地利Type 2插座配合使用。中国GB/T标准与欧盟IEC 62196标准之间不存在双边接口互认或相互接受协议。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電採用GB/T 20234.2標準，定義了與IEC Type 2物理上不相容的7針接口。GB/T插頭無法與歐盟/奧地利Type 2插座配合使用。中國GB/T標準與歐盟IEC 62196標準之間不存在雙邊接口互認或相互接受協議。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. A Chinese EV or EVSE designed only around a GB/T AC interface cannot interoperate with Austrian public Type 2 AC infrastructure without a physical inlet/socket and control-interface redesign. The connector body, pin count, and locking mechanism all differ. AFIR is a binding EU Regulation directly applicable in Austria — there is no member-state flexibility to accept GB/T connectors for publicly accessible recharging points. Any adapter strategy for public infrastructure must be checked against AFIR and Austrian safety rules.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅围绕GB/T交流接口设计的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计物理插座/接口及控制接口的情况下，无法与奥地利公共Type 2交流基础设施互操作。接口外形、针脚数量及锁定机构均不相同。AFIR是在奥地利直接适用的具有约束力的欧盟法规——成员国无权就公众可访问充电点接受GB/T接口。公共基础设施中的任何转接方案均须按AFIR及奥地利安全规则核查。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅圍繞GB/T交流接口設計的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計物理插座/接口及控制接口的情況下，無法與奧地利公共Type 2交流基礎設施互操作。接口外形、針腳數量及鎖定機構均不相同。AFIR是在奧地利直接適用的具有約束力的歐盟法規——成員國無權就公眾可訪問充電點接受GB/T接口。公共基礎設施中的任何轉接方案均須按AFIR及奧地利安全規則核查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible AC recharging points, including Type 2 availability as specified in Annex II. Austria is directly subject to AFIR as an EU member state. IEC/EN 62196-2 is the voluntary technical connector standard used to implement that legal requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 required for EV sold in China; no bilateral recognition with EU IEC 62196

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for Austrian / EU public charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T AC. AFIR creates the binding legal obligation for publicly accessible AC recharging points in Austria; Type 2 connector compatibility (IEC/EN 62196-2) is the required technical implementation. GB/T AC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Type 2 compatibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T交流接口，则就奥地利/欧盟公共充电互操作性而言现状不合规。AFIR为奥地利公众可访问交流充电点建立具有约束力的法律义务；Type 2接口兼容性（IEC/EN 62196-2）是所要求的技术实现。GB/T交流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Type 2兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T交流接口，則就奧地利/歐盟公共充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。AFIR為奧地利公眾可訪問交流充電點建立具有約束力的法律義務；Type 2接口相容性（IEC/EN 62196-2）是所要求的技術實現。GB/T交流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Type 2相容性。

requirement_topic.en: DC Fast-Charging Connector Standard — CCS Combo 2 (Austria / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口标准——CCS Combo 2（奥地利／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口標準——CCS Combo 2（奧地利／歐盟）

summary.en: EU public DC recharging points are subject to AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) requirements. AFIR Annex II specifies Combo 2 (CCS2) for high-power DC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-3 describes the CCS Combo 2 technical connector design. Austria, as an EU member state, is directly subject to AFIR; CCS2 is the required DC fast-charging connector for publicly accessible DC infrastructure in Austria. CHAdeMO is not the primary EU/Austrian standard and is declining in new deployments.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共直流充电点受AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）要求约束。AFIR附件II规定高功率直流充电点采用Combo 2（CCS2）。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技术设计。奥地利作为欧盟成员国，AFIR直接适用；CCS2是奥地利公众可访问直流基础设施所要求的直流快充接口。CHAdeMO不是欧盟/奥地利的主要标准，新部署中正在减少。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共直流充電點受AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）要求約束。AFIR附件II規定高功率直流充電點採用Combo 2（CCS2）。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技術設計。奧地利作為歐盟成員國，AFIR直接適用；CCS2是奧地利公眾可訪問直流基礎設施所要求的直流快充接口。CHAdeMO不是歐盟/奧地利的主要標準，新部署中正在減少。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 for DC fast charging, defining a physically distinct 9-pin connector incompatible with CCS Combo 2. The pin layout, communication protocol (CAN-based GB/T 27930 vs. PLC-based ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 in EU CCS practice), and inlet shape all differ. No bilateral connector recognition exists between China GB/T and EU IEC 62196 series.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3标准，定义了与CCS Combo 2物理上不兼容的9针接口。针脚布局、通信协议（基于CAN的GB/T 27930与欧盟CCS实践中基于PLC的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121）及接口外形均不相同。中国GB/T与欧盟IEC 62196系列之间不存在双边接口互认机制。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3標準，定義了與CCS Combo 2物理上不相容的9針接口。針腳佈局、通訊協定（基於CAN的GB/T 27930與歐盟CCS實務中基於PLC的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121）及接口外形均不相同。中國GB/T與歐盟IEC 62196系列之間不存在雙邊接口互認機制。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. Chinese EVs or EVSE with only a GB/T DC interface cannot fast-charge at Austrian / EU CCS2 public stations without hardware and communication-stack redesign. The communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC) also differs. AFIR is directly applicable in Austria — no member-state flexibility to accept GB/T DC connectors for in-scope publicly accessible infrastructure. Any adapter strategy must be checked against AFIR and Austrian safety rules.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅配备GB/T直流接口的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计硬件及通信协议栈的情况下，无法在奥地利/欧盟CCS2公共快充站充电。通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC）也不同。AFIR在奥地利直接适用——成员国无权就适用范围内的公众可访问基础设施接受GB/T直流接口。任何转接方案均须按AFIR及奥地利安全规则核查。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅配備GB/T直流接口的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計硬件及通訊協議棧的情況下，無法在奧地利/歐盟CCS2公共快充站充電。通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN與ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC）也不同。AFIR在奧地利直接適用——成員國無權就適用範圍內的公眾可訪問基礎設施接受GB/T直流接口。任何轉接方案均須按AFIR及奧地利安全規則核查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible high-power DC recharging points including Combo 2 (CCS2) are directly applicable in Austria. IEC/EN 62196-3 is the voluntary technical connector standard used to implement that legal requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 required for DC fast-charge EV sold in China; no reciprocal recognition on EU side

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for Austrian / EU public DC charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T DC. AFIR directly mandates CCS Combo 2 for in-scope DC public infrastructure in Austria. GB/T DC interfaces and GB/T 27930 communication are not substitutes for AFIR-compliant CCS2 compatibility. Hardware and communication-stack redesign is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T直流接口，则就奥地利/欧盟公共直流充电互操作性而言现状不合规。AFIR直接要求奥地利适用范围内直流公共基础设施采用CCS Combo 2。GB/T直流接口及GB/T 27930通信不能替代符合AFIR要求的CCS2兼容性。须进行硬件和通信协议栈重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T直流接口，則就奧地利/歐盟公共直流充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。AFIR直接要求奧地利適用範圍內直流公共基礎設施採用CCS Combo 2。GB/T直流接口及GB/T 27930通訊不能替代符合AFIR要求的CCS2相容性。須進行硬件和通訊協議棧重新設計。

requirement_topic.en: Legal Mandate: AFIR vs. AFID and Transition Timeline (Austria)
requirement_topic.zh: 法律依据：AFIR与AFID及过渡时间表（奥地利）
requirement_topic.zht: 法律依據：AFIR與AFID及過渡時間表（奧地利）

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) replaced Directive 2014/94/EU (AFID) with binding targets. AFIR entered into force 13 April 2024. New public charging pools must comply from that date; all existing pools must be upgraded to Type 2 / CCS2 by 2025–2026 depending on power level. AFIR is directly applicable in all EU member states — including Austria — without transposition. Austria is additionally subject to TEN-T deployment targets as a central transit country in the EU road network.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规2023/1804（AFIR）以具有约束力的目标取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR于2024年4月13日生效。新建公共充电站须自该日期起符合要求；现有充电站须于2025-2026年（依功率等级而定）完成升级，配备Type 2/CCS2接口。AFIR在所有欧盟成员国（包括奥地利）直接适用，无需转化立法。奥地利作为欧盟公路网络的核心过境国，还须遵守TEN-T部署目标。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規2023/1804（AFIR）以具有約束力的目標取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR於2024年4月13日生效。新建公共充電站須自該日期起符合要求；現有充電站須於2025-2026年（依功率等級而定）完成升級，配備Type 2/CCS2接口。AFIR在所有歐盟成員國（包括奧地利）直接適用，無需轉化立法。奧地利作為歐盟公路網絡的核心過境國，還須遵守TEN-T部署目標。

summary.en: China's equivalent policy mandate is GB/T 20234 series (enforced via MIIT type-approval). No bilateral connector recognition or mutual acceptance agreement exists between China GB/T 20234 and EU IEC 62196 standards. (Confirmed: no bilateral connector or certification mutual recognition treaty between CN GB/T 20234 and EU IEC 62196 has been concluded as of June 2026.)
summary.zh: 中国对应的政策强制要求为GB/T 20234系列（通过工信部型式认证执行）。中国GB/T标准与欧盟IEC 62196标准之间不存在双边接口互认或相互接受协议。（已确认：截至2026年6月，中国GB/T 20234与欧盟IEC 62196之间未签订双边接口或认证互认条约。）
summary.zht: 中國對應的政策強制要求為GB/T 20234系列（通過工信部型式認證執行）。中國GB/T標準與歐盟IEC 62196標準之間不存在雙邊接口互認或相互接受協議。（已確認：截至2026年6月，中國GB/T 20234與歐盟IEC 62196之間未簽訂雙邊接口或認證互認條約。）

gap.en: No harmonisation or mutual recognition between GB/T and IEC 62196 series. AFIR is a binding EU Regulation (not a Directive), meaning Austria has no flexibility to accept GB/T connectors for in-scope publicly accessible recharging infrastructure. Any EV or EVSE destined for the Austrian public market must carry Type 2 (AC) and CCS Combo 2 (DC) inlets as a hard market-entry requirement.
gap.zh: GB/T与IEC 62196系列之间不存在协调或互认机制。AFIR是具有约束力的欧盟法规（而非指令），奥地利无权就适用范围内的公众可访问充电基础设施接受GB/T接口。任何面向奥地利公共市场的电动汽车或充电设备，必须配备Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充电接口，这是进入市场的硬性要求。
gap.zht: GB/T與IEC 62196系列之間不存在協調或互認機制。AFIR是具有約束力的歐盟法規（而非指令），奧地利無權就適用範圍內的公眾可訪問充電基礎設施接受GB/T接口。任何面向奧地利公共市場的電動汽車或充電設備，必須配備Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充電接口，這是進入市場的硬性要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR is directly applicable across EU member states including Austria from 13 April 2024 for in-scope publicly accessible recharging infrastructure. IEC/EN 62196 connector standards are technical specifications referenced to implement AFIR connector requirements, not standalone legal obligations.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically; no reciprocal obligation on EU/Austrian side to accept GB/T

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant as-is for Austrian / EU public charging infrastructure where a product relies on Chinese GB/T connectors only. AFIR creates the binding EU obligation for in-scope public infrastructure in Austria; Type 2 / Combo 2 technical compatibility is the practical redesign item. This is a product and infrastructure interoperability gap, not merely a documentation gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅依赖中国GB/T接口，则就奥地利/欧盟公共充电基础设施而言现状不合规。AFIR为奥地利适用范围内公共基础设施建立具有约束力的欧盟义务；Type 2 / Combo 2技术兼容性是实际产品重新设计事项。这是产品及基础设施互操作差距，而非单纯文件缺失。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅依賴中國GB/T接口，則就奧地利/歐盟公共充電基礎設施而言現狀不合規。AFIR為奧地利適用範圍內公共基礎設施建立具有約束力的歐盟義務；Type 2 / Combo 2技術相容性是實際產品重新設計事項。這是產品及基礎設施互操作差距，而非單純文件缺失。
